since_last: 55% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.36%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.01% · BTC +0.35% · Gold +1.88% · Nasdaq100 -0.74%. 55% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.36%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.36%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +8.28%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.28%, PUBM +8.25%, MGNI +7.97%, DV +7.69%, APP +7.45%. Laggards: TER -8.27%, HPE -7.38%, VRT -7.21%, NXPI -6.42%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.44% at $156.73
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
